citation_text: HRANA comprehensive report on the Iran-Israel Twelve-Day War (13-24 June 2025): 1,190 killed, 4,475 injured; breakdown 436 civilians, 435 military, 319 unconfirmed.
Iranian Ministry of Health official toll: 935-1,060 killed, 4,000+ wounded (June 2025 war).
AP reported Iran raised official death toll from war with Israel to 1,060 (8 July 2025).
ACLED Iran war updates: US-Israeli and Iranian strike events tracked; ~360 Israeli attacks across 27 provinces in the June 2025 war.
